title: GSR 417 Corrigendum to GSR 879 (29.05.2002)
text: REGD, NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 265] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, JUNE 7, 2002/JYAISTHA 17,1924 1834 GI/2002 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SEC, 3 (i)] -- 2 of 4 -- J MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS CORRK2GNDUM New Delhi, the 29th May, 2002 G.S.R. 417 (E).—-In partial modification of GSR 576(E) published on page 10 of the Gazette of India Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3 (i) on 9-7-2001 and GSR 879 (E) published on page 2 of Gazette of India Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3(i) on 4-12-2001 Para (iii)5, para (iv), 6(ii) and SI. No. 23 maybe substituted by the following :— (i) In para (iii) for serial number 5 and entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely— "5 (a) Regional Passport Officer, (Regional Passport Office, Chennai) (b) Assistant Passport Officer, (Regional Passport Office, Chennai) (c) Public Relation Officer, (Regional Passport Office, Chennai) (d) Superintendent, (Regional Passport Office, Chennai) The districts of Chennai, Chingelput (E), Kanchipuram, "\fellore Truruvannmalai, Erode, Coimbatore, (Urban), Coimbatore (R), Salem (Urban), Salem (R), Namakkal, Cuddalorc, Villupuram, Dharmapuri, Nilgiris, Karaikkal, ThiravaUur of the State of Tamil Nadu and Union Territory of pondicherry except districts of Mane and Yanam. Ditto Ditto Ditto."; (ii) In para (iv) for serial number 6(ii) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall respectively be substituted, namely:— "6 (ii) Passport Officer (Passport Office, Kozhikode) The districts of Palakkad Malappuram, Wayanad, Kozhikode, Kannaur, Kasargod of the state of Kerala and the district of Mane in the Union Territory of Pondichcny." -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THEOAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SEC. 3 (i)l (Ui) In para (vii) for Serial number 9 and entries relating thereto, the following entries shall be substituted, namely:— "9, (a) Passport Officer, The districts of Adilabad, Nizamabad, (Passport Office.
